nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Leaflove
nodes.summary: Leaflove是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Leaflove。

nodes.name: Leaflove
nodes.summary: Leaflove may refer to: Red-tailed leaflove, also known as African leaflove, common leaflove, leaflove and plain leaflove, a species of bird found in western and central Africa Uela leaflove and Gabon leaflove, subspecies Simple leaflove, alternate name for the simple greenbul, a species of bird found in western and central Africa Yellow-throated leaflove, a species of bird found in western and central Africa Congo white-throated leaflove, subspecies
